title: Career Pathways – Law: Jenna Krohn
summary: BSNC’s Career Pathways Series helps showcase jobs held by successful shareholders and descendants. This series aims to raise awareness of these career options and the essential skills needed to succeed in these positions. BSNC shareholder Jenna L. Krohn joined BSNC as corporate counsel in 2021. title: Transmitter upgrade complete!
summary: We appreciate your patience and support during the outage and interruptions over the past month. Our new transmitter is installed and ready to add new next-generation television features in the coming years.
